description_long: This object is a rectangular electronic device with a sleek, modern design, featuring a matte and glossy black finish. The left side of the top surface is smooth with a small logo, while the right side has a textured, diagonal-striped pattern, likely for ventilation. The front face includes a disc slot and a prominent circular button, suggesting it is a gaming console or media player. The rear and side panels are mostly solid, with subtle venting visible, indicating internal cooling requirements. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of plastic and metal materials. Branding and design cues suggest it is an Xbox One console, commonly found in entertainment setups within urban homes or recreational spaces.
description: A sleek, black rectangular electronic device with a mix of matte and textured surfaces, featuring a disc slot and a circular button on the front.
description_view_0: The front and top of the device are visible, showing the disc slot, circular power button, and the Xbox logo.
description_view_1: The right side and top are visible, highlighting the diagonal-striped ventilation pattern and the solid side panel.
description_view_2: The rear and top are visible, showing the back panel with additional venting and the absence of interactive features.
description_view_3: The left side and top are visible, displaying the smooth matte surface and the Xbox logo on the corner.
